summary: Phase E.3.2 testing: Backend pytest 12/12 PASS (test_iteration57_compliance_hub.py). Curl verified induction templates (children_worker=21, adult_worker=21, manager=23 sections; estimated_hours & estimated_completion present) and /api/induction/recommend-template returns correct fields. Frontend /policies?tab=dashboard rendered fully in Children's workspace: all 7 KPI tiles (kpi-policy/acknowledgement/training/supervision/induction/workforce/regulator) present, 'View records' text appears 7 times (drill-down on every KPI), hero label = 'Ofsted Readiness · Children's Services' with score 41/100, evidence-download-btn present, 'Inspection evidence' & 'Recent assignments' sections present BENEATH the unified dashboard, kpi-policy is an <a> with href '/policies?tab=library' (drill-down working). The induction modal flow and the Adult-sector UI switch were not fully exercised because the demo login form became flaky in subsequent Playwright contexts (form inputs failed to render despite networkidle — re-login from a fresh browser context kept bouncing through /login → /welcome → /login). Backend already proves adult-sector dashboard returns regulator_readiness with regulator='cqc' and readiness_label='CQC Readiness' (covered in test_iteration57_compliance_hub.py).

issues: React hydration warning logged: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' originating from InductionPolicyHub line 436 (evidence-staff select renders staff names wrapped in a <span> inside <option>). Cosmetic — does not break functionality but pollutes console and risks SSR/hydration mismatches.

action_items: Main agent: please self-verify the AssignModal recommendation tile + auto-template-select + 'Manager override' badge flow on /induction (testids: induction-assign-modal, induction-assign-staff, induction-assign-template, induction-recommendation). Backend recommendation API is confirmed correct, so the wiring just needs UI smoke-test.

Main agent: please self-verify Adult sector swap via avatar / OrgSwitcher (no [data-testid='org-switcher'] was found in DOM; sector swap probably lives behind the 'Sarah Manager' sidebar avatar menu — confirm a user-facing path to switch to Adult exists from a logged-in session). Backend already returns CQC for sector=adult.
Optional: fix the InductionPolicyHub evidence-staff <option> hydration warning by removing the <span> wrapper or rendering plain text inside <option>.
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceDashboard.jsx: clean separation, deterministic, sector-aware via effectiveMode — good.
compliance_dashboard.py mounted at /api/compliance/unified-dashboard — staff RBAC returns 403 as required (verified by pytest).

Backend induction template counts match spec (21/21/23) and include all required manager keys (safer_recruitment, supervision_leadership, leadership, compliance_audits, investigations, workforce_management, inspection_readiness, supervision).
Hydration warning from <span> inside <option> in InductionPolicyHub.jsx ~line 436 (staffOptions render). Low priority but should be cleaned up.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (Children's dashboard fully verified; induction modal + adult sector UI swap not fully covered due to flaky login on repeat browser sessions)

seed_data_creation: None. No test data was created (Assign submit was skipped to avoid duplicate inductions).
context_for_next_testing_agent: First Playwright run (with persistent session) successfully verified Children's compliance dashboard end-to-end. Subsequent contexts kept failing because the SPA login form's <input> elements didn't render in time (input count=0 even after networkidle). When re-testing, use page.wait_for_selector('input[name=\"email\"], #email', timeout=15000) before fill, or call the backend /api/auth/login first and inject the JWT cookie. Backend pytest 12/12 PASS is the source of truth for KPI structure and sector-aware regulator switching.
rca_of_the_issue: Not a product bug — testing-tool flakiness only. The SPA login page momentarily renders a skeleton before mounting the controlled-input form; selectors like input[type=email] resolved before mount in 2 out of 3 Playwright runs.
